name: New Theme Request
about: Request a new application to be themed with Violet Void

labels: enhancement, theme-request

## Application Information

**Application Name:**
**Application Type:** (e.g., terminal, editor, browser extension, desktop app)
**Official Website:**
**Repository:** (if open source)

## Existing Theme Support

- [ ] The application supports custom themes
- [ ] Documentation exists for theme format
- [ ] Other popular themes exist for this app (catppuccin, nord, dracula, etc.)

## Theme Format Details

**Theme Format:** (e.g., JSON, YAML, CSS, proprietary)
**Theme Location:** (e.g., `~/.config/app/theme.json`)
**Documentation Link:**

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples of existing themes for this application.

## Would you like to contribute this theme?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to work on this theme
- [ ] I can help test the theme once created
- [ ] Just suggesting, no contribution planned
